reviews.author: Mikey P
reviews.text: It's an ok pine forest, you won't be able to see any stunning views or anything as the tall pines block everything, but an interesting contrast and worth a quick stop if you have plenty of free time on your loop

reviews.author: Zoeflame Menon
reviews.text: Great experience in the pine forest exiting to see it in the top mountains in vietnam

reviews.author: Fan
reviews.text: If you need a small break from driving, it is nice to visit this eco park in the pine forest. We were not really sure what we were all seeing there as it did not really make sense to us, but it was beautiful nevertheless. You can drive your bike up to the forest on a steep hill and park it there.

reviews.author: James Wilson
reviews.text: Beautiful forest great during sunshine or rain. There’s a little cafe there that does bottled drinks with a lovely owner and her pets. Highly recommend if you’re passing by

reviews.author: Mikhail Panfilov
reviews.text: I came there just before the sunset. The place was really calm and beautiful. The scent of pines is amazing

reviews.author: Inna Ivanova
reviews.text: It's a wonderful place. I love pine forest. It's a good place to relax. There's a bin, but, unfortunately, it doesn't stop some people from littering in such a great place and we saw rubbish here and there.

reviews.author: Patrick Ho
reviews.text: Nice place to relax during the bike tour. Lot of pine tree

reviews.author: Hector Sherry
reviews.text: Very cool stop on the Ha gaing loop would recommend, there is a steep hill which you can drive your motorbike up otherwise if you don't fancy driving a bike up leave it at the bottom of the ramp and walk, local farmer was grazing his cows here, views all around were stunning

reviews.author: Megaworld Asia
reviews.text: This is a nice place to take a break from the ride through the mountains. The site is easy to access as it’s right next to the highway. You can ride your bike up into the cool atmosphere of the forest and get away from the heat of the day. The forest is a true pine plantation with clear ground and no undergrowth. For a nice view through the trees, climb up the small hill which slopes up from the parking area. Safe travels, Mega.

reviews.author: Magdalena Warnke
reviews.text: Love this place! Perfect for a break, there is little shop with amazing tea (not instant!). Owner is also really nice.

reviews.author: Calum Montgomery
reviews.text: Beautiful spot just off the road to stop for a coffee. Worst toilet I have ever seen anywhere in the world though.

reviews.author: Sandeep Akurathi
reviews.text: Pine Forest, this place was very calm and beautiful. Must visit for relaxation and capture good photos. No wait time.

reviews.author: Korrine Koh
reviews.text: Nice place for a break. But don’t think you’re missing out much too if you’re unable to stop. The drive here allows you to see much of the pines as well.

reviews.author: Paulius Vargalis
reviews.text: Nice forrest, the same like in europe, nice place to stop rest. :)

reviews.author: Nguyen Xuan Nguyen (Nicolas Nguyen)
reviews.text: Very nice view point but there is a drink stall there

reviews.author: John Powell
reviews.text: This was a pleasant visit. A few benches, plastic chairs, couple of firepits, nice smell all over. Tall pine trees in the area. Nice place to relax and enjoy nature. Small building sells beer, soft drinks and munchies at reasonable prices.

reviews.author: Tom W
reviews.text: The cafe had closed while I was there. A nice forest. Nothing more.

reviews.author: Mun Ping Fong
reviews.text: Fabulous experience to interact with local kids there. To all tourists, please be kind and gentle to the little angels there

reviews.author: Nàng Gốm
reviews.text: Beautiful place will clean air, big tree, mountains and street food!

reviews.author: Lachie Macnaughtan
reviews.text: Saw some buffalo in a mountainous setting, very unexpected and beautiful.

reviews.author: Qwwerty Tre
reviews.text: Stopped here to get some rest on the first day on the loop. And it was a great choice - the most beautiful pine forest in the mountains, where you can chill, and also excellent and inexpensive local food.

reviews.author: Alex Tillotson
reviews.text: Perfect stop to stretch your legs, the temperature cools down on top of the pass so feels amazing. The stop is definitely 5 stars but unfortunately there is a lot of trash from inconsiderate people.

reviews.author: oos8547
reviews.text: Nice forests, remember to put bikes in first gear when going up the steep pathway 👍🏼

reviews.author: Kristina
reviews.text: Such a lovely place to stop and walk around.

reviews.author: Tung Phung
reviews.text: Reminded me of Dalat with similar pine forest. Nice place for photo taking.

reviews.author: pakalla
reviews.text: Cute little pine forest. Very unexpected that line trees grow here!

reviews.author: Kailyn Leckie
reviews.text: Good stopping point, man selling some drinks and snacks up here. Pine forest is really beautiful. Be careful of the WC - lots of wasps.

reviews.author: Hye Huang
reviews.text: I moved over here and didn't stop, but the scenery here is amazing, like Da Lat

reviews.author: shachar gat
reviews.text: Actually visited for like 10 minutes, a nice break during the ha giang loop.

reviews.author: Wilfred
reviews.text: Nothing special to see as viewpoint. Also the area is very polluted with garbage by visitors to this place.
